text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I move through these modern spaces. The clean glass meeting rooms echo with potential dialogue and unspoken thoughts. Entering the vibrant, graphic-laden R&D space, I am struck by the interplay of clarity and confusion. The words on the screen resonate with my own experience—the way perception can blur in unfamiliar environments. I feel curious and slightly disoriented, but also energized by the promise of new ideas emerging here.
